name: bug
description: Confirmed defect or broken behavior.

name: enhancement
description: New feature request or product improvement.

name: documentation
description: Documentation content, structure, or docs tooling.

name: question
description: Usage question or clarification request.

name: research
description: Benchmark design, evaluation method, or paper-facing research work.

name: security
description: Security hardening, sandbox policy, or defense robustness work.

name: maintenance
description: Refactoring, housekeeping, or repository maintenance.

name: dependencies
description: Dependency upgrades or ecosystem compatibility changes.

name: release
description: Versioning, packaging, release automation, or distribution assets.

name: good first issue
description: Small, well-scoped work suitable for first-time contributors.

name: help wanted
description: Maintainers welcome external help on this item.

name: duplicate
description: This issue or pull request already exists.

name: invalid
description: This report or proposal is not actionable as filed.

name: wontfix
description: This item will not be worked on.

name: area: benchmark
description: Benchmark cases, schemas, or benchmark packaging.

name: area: cli
description: CLI behavior, commands, or terminal UX.

name: area: core
description: Agent loop, LLM clients, or shared runtime logic.

name: area: defenses
description: Defense implementations, configs, or defense registry.

name: area: evaluation
description: Metrics, analysis, reporting, judges, or experiments.

name: area: docs
description: README, docs site, templates, or contributor guidance.

name: area: tooling
description: CI, scripts, packaging, developer tooling, or automation.

name: area: release
description: Tags, releases, checksums, SBOMs, attestations, or distribution.

name: priority: p0
description: Release-blocking or security-critical work.

name: priority: p1
description: High-priority work that should be handled soon.

name: priority: p2
description: Normal roadmap priority.

name: priority: p3
description: Nice-to-have or backlog work.

name: status: needs-triage
description: New item awaiting maintainer triage.

name: status: needs-info
description: Needs more detail from the reporter before action.

name: status: ready
description: Triaged and ready for implementation.

name: status: in-progress
description: Actively being worked on.

name: status: blocked
description: Cannot proceed until an external dependency or decision is resolved.
